title: Tired of managing my trading on Excel, so I built this instead
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi everyone, as a developer, I finally had to admit that my brain and my Excel files weren't built for current market volatility. I was done with lagging spreadsheets and making emotional decisions during gold spikes.

I spent my nights coding Hercul Market : [https://hercul-market.vercel.app](https://hercul-market.vercel.app) to automate what actually matters: market structure and cold data.

Why this is different from a basic journal:

* AI Structure Analyzer: The tool identifies liquidity zones and Order Blocks without my own confirmation bias.
* Real Performance: Automated XIRR and drawdown calculation directly via PostgreSQL, so no more broken formulas.
* Hardcoded Discipline: Risk/Reward (RR) ratio is calculated before the entry. If the numbers aren't there, I don't click.

Real-world result this week: A 5.5 RR trade for $1,200 profit, managed entirely through the dashboard to avoid exiting too early out of fear.

The project is in free beta for anyone looking for an "engineer-minded" approach to trading. The link is at the top.

What are you using for your logs? A SaaS, a custom script, or are you still doing everything by hand? 📈💻
